title: portulaca australis
intro: Portulaca australis, also known as Australian portulaca or moss rose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Portulacaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Portulaca australis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
